root.name: Add vCPU4 Circle and Time-sharing Diagram Entry
root.description: Evaluates whether the agent successfully added a fourth vCPU circle (vCPU4) next to existing circles using a different color and added vCPU4 to the time-sharing diagram on slide 3

children.name: vCPU4 Circle Added
children.description: Verifies that a fourth vCPU circle labeled vCPU4 was added next to the existing three circles

children.name: vCPU4 Circle Presence
children.description: Checks if a fourth circle element with vCPU4 label exists on slide 3

children.name: vCPU4 Circle Color Differentiation
children.description: Verifies that the vCPU4 circle uses a different color from the existing three circles

children.name: vCPU4 Circle Positioning
children.description: Verifies that the vCPU4 circle is positioned next to the existing three circles and with proper spacing

children.name: Time-sharing Diagram Updated
children.description: Verifies that vCPU4 was added to the time-sharing diagram on slide 3

children.name: No Unintended Changes
children.description: Ensures that no unintended modifications were made to other slides or elements

children.name: Other Slides Unchanged
children.description: Verifies that slides other than slide 3 remain unchanged

children.name: No Unintended Animations/Transitions
children.description: Ensures no unintended animations or transitions were added or modified

metadata.task: On slide 3, Add a fourth vCPU circle (vCPU4) next to the existing three circles using a different color and also add vCPU4 to the time-sharing diagram
